headline: Cummins (CMI) Stock Looks Reasonably Priced After Earnings Beat Hopes
summary: Cummins stock has delivered a very strong 5 year run, yet its valuation checks send a mixed signal. The Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value is sitting close to the current price, while market multiples still screen the shares as undervalued. A 207.0% total return over the past 5 years suggests Cummins has already rewarded long term holders, so fresh buyers need to think carefully about what is now priced in. Expectations for continued profitability strength can support the current...
